review_body_text: For protege it is okay to learn new things Certain department practised hybrid Very high paced and competitive Nice culture No politic office and comfort workplace
pros_text: can be absorbed to become execs

review_body_text: Has so much elearning to complete & to learn from as u need in-depth knowledge for the job & everyone is very positive & always motivates u to become a better manager
Many thing can learn. Also you can enjoy to work and collaborate with many department on giving them support from hardware and software. And also provide them training on new system.
Good for career growth Good management you must agile and have a good vision on job Well experience staff Helpful staff Fast paced working area Critical business area

Pros: High-performance work culture Good for experience and career enhancement Protection in salary and benefits Cons : Very busy and stressfull, working in long hours You might meet with toxic team who are not reflect Maybank culture and values

Its a gd experience and benefit. Working environment is very good.U will hv more knowledge on Financial Sector. Your career will support by the company and you will have better opportunities on your career for your future betterment.
Friendly staff , teamwork , pleasure to work at malayan banking berhad . I gain many knowledge. I forward to work more with Maybank . I feel excited and happy.
Good for those with persuasive speaking talent, learn much & earn much at the same time. They provide consultation sessions for employees whom cannot cope with kpi targets

review_title: Good place to have fast pace working environment and get promoted
review_body_text: Supportive bosses and team. If you wanted to start career with sales position you better need to mastered out your mandarin and not just English. Why ? majority customers were chinese (specifically for premier services).

review_title: You need to have strong passion to work in banking industry
review_body_text: ... if not, you will easily burn out. You need to master self-motivated skills to survive. Most managers expect you to answer their call/email fast even tho you're on leave. But it's good for you to learn how to manage your time, esp for fresh graduates. Workplace culture depends on a branch. If your colleagues are okay, then okay lah.
Happy with friendly colleagues. Hope they can increases facility like cafe(more choices), desktop, car park, gim, staff room (to rest), chill room (with activities)

The team is so unorganized. No proper planning and they change everything time to time. QA Is so unprofessional. High expectations without proper training towards the employee. No work life balance. Force OT for all, more money but no life. Not a recommended place to work.

Sometimes it can be way too exhausted and stressful but I would take it as a good exposure to the new challenges. Collaborative and good support from the team. Since everything is working in the fast paces, you will likely to have your things done in a minimal supervision. Well it can be 'ugh' at times but sometimes it is better that way nevertheless you should always be ready and well equipped for your things.

A lot of new things can be learn and staff also very friendly. The work environment is very good. As a banker, we cannot run from our target that we need to achieve. It is quite stressful yet competitive environment in term of sales department. Somehow,we have to be more independent and interact with lot of people in the workplace as well as our customers.
pros_text: Benefits, and employee staff is very helpful

review_body_text: Always confident with customer Happy to do the sales Make marketing Tell people about the benefit of the product in the life Make people happy Easy going
Corporate image, career advancement, good discipline, branding, social responsibility, & pleasant working environment, compliance culture, friendly & helpful bosses & subordinates
pros_text: Free lunch during MCO, services easily available

review_title: Happy work environment depending on department
review_body_text: Maybank is a place where we can gain banking and finance experience. Every place have its own speciality, valuable moment and expertise. It is depending on us to bring ourselves, to expose ourselves
cons_text: High sales target, heavy work load under Cash Management Dept may require always to stayback until night

review_body_text: A lot can be learnt and fun working environment. Sometimes stressful sometimes fun. You have to know how to carry yourself as a trainee because they are way too busy to guide you from the scratch throughout the internship period.
pros_text: Fun environment, friendly staff, willing to help
cons_text: A lot of papers wasted, I think we should be more environmental friendly

review_title: Productive workplace and supportive team members
review_body_text: Maybank has the best work culture, very fast, very efficient, smooth and professional. Their bureaucracy works efficiently in identifying abd solving problems as they are the biggest bank.

review_title: Review is different person has different working experiencerience
review_body_text: Good Management and Staff relationship and teamwork is always applied. Good interpersonal relationship between staff and Management is always applied at Maybank. Staff knows the Management direction and willingly working hard to achieved the goal.
